properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 67/18

ANDOEYA TEST CENTER WILL CONDUCT TEST AND TRAINING OF MILITARY SYSTEMS FROM ANDOEYA, 
IN THE TIME PERIOD FROM JUNE 18TH TO JUNE 26TH 2018. THE TEST/TRAINING WILL BE CONDUCTED 
BETWEEN 21:00 AND 04:00 LOCAL TIME IN THE ANNOUNCED TIME PERIOD. SEAGOING TRAFFIC ARE 
REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF AND STAY OUTSIDE THE FOLLOWING DANGER AREAS DURING THE 
ANNOUNCED TIME PERIODS:

DANGER AREA JULIETT:
AN AREA WITHIN THE FOLLOWING COORDINATES:
1. N69-18.5 E15-52.0
2. N69-26.1 E14-57.4
3. N70-13.8 E12-40.9
4. N70-48.7 E15-58.3
5. N69-53.6 E16-40.3
6. N69-28.8 E16-43.2
7. N69-18.5 E15-52.0

DANGER AREA INDIA:
AN AREA WITHIN THE FOLLOWING COORDINATES:
1. N69-22.5 E15-50.6
2. N69-44.4 E16-10.1
3. N69-39.2 E17-13.4
4. N69-26.3 E16-57.2
5. N69-21.2 E16-32.0
6. N69-22.5 E15-50.6

SEE WWW.TESTCENTER.NO FOR DAILY UPDATES”
